name: Hirotaka Wakamatsu
description: Freshman who belong to the basketball club and he knows Nozaki since middle school since they were in the same basketball club. He played against Seo a basketball match and her rough play make him unable to sleep but was able to sleep soundly later thanks to the voice of Lorelei which he doesn't know her true identity.

name: Howzer
description: Hauser is a Holy Knight, a colleague and partner of Gilthunder, and a subordinate of the Great Holy Knight, Dreyfus. He wears a set of Holy Knight armor and has short light-colored curled up hair. Hauser demonstrates a lot of self confidence and is very optimistic, which is the complete opposite of Gilthunder's personality; he is also shown to be somewhat naive and stupid.

name: Konatsu
description: Konatsu is the daughter of [Sukeroku](https://anilist.co/character/89346/) and [Miyokichi](https://anilist.co/character/89577/), and Yakumo the 8th's ward. She normally fights back against what [Yakumo](https://anilist.co/character/89345/) says and wants, and will exhibit this sort of behaviour to anyone else she doesn't trust. She is also a great teacher of rakugo, although somewhat stern.

name: Miyoko Sahara
description: A kind girl from Ishida and Nishimiya's elementary school. She was the only person willing to make an effort to learn sign language and befriend Nishimiya. ~!Sadly, this singled her out for bullying too, and started to take all her classes in the nurse's office. Ishida finds Sahara several years later so she can reconnect with Nishimiya, and she becomes her friend again. She was always and is still bullied by Ueno for her unorthodox sense of fashion, however, the two remain close even after they

name: Monet
description: __Height:__ 227 cm (7'5") __Affiliations:__ Donquixote Pirates __Devil Fruit:__ Yuki Yuki no Mi (Snow-Snow Fruit) __Devil Fruit Type:__ Logia Monet is a harpy who poses as a scout and assistant for Caesar Clown and his underlings in the research facility on Punk Hazard. She is revealed to be a deep cover agent sent by Donquixote Doflamingo. name: Naraku
description: The main antagonist, Naraku (literally means "underworld", or "hell") is responsible for nearly every character’s suffering throughout the series. He is a han'yō that originated from a bandit named Onigumo ("Demon Spider"). Naraku's main goal is to collect all of the shards of the Shikon no Tama in order to become a full Youkai.His platonic love for Kikyo is what drove him to kill Kikyo and seal Inuyasha on the tree and basic reason to became a demon.
mediaTitles: InuYasha the Movie 2: The Castle Beyond the Looking Glass

name: Narita Top Road
description: __Height:__ 166 cm Narita Top Road is bright, breezy, and brimming with sporting spirit; always fighting on, whatever the adversity, to repay the faith of all her fans. Her roommate is [Jungle Pocket](https://anilist.co/character/322150/Jungle-Pocket).

Renge first came across the Host Club by maintaining the belief she was Kyoya's fiancée despite never having met him in person. description: __Birthday:__ April 2 __Height:__ 151 cm (4'11") Shiori is one of Tamako's classmates and a member of the badminton club. She is a knowledgeable and resourceful girl, with a serious, cool personality. (Source: Wikipedia)

description: A cousin and classmate of Saitou. She has the appearance of a doll and an attractive cool expression. She is a good friend of Saitou, who grew up with her like a brother and sister.

name: Shoukichi Naruko
description: As a sprinter, he has a competitive nature, and easily gets upset or disappointed when he is beaten in a race. He considered Imaizumi his rival, and therefore gets particularly riled up when he thinks that Imaizumi is winning. He also gets this way with his mentor, Tadakoro Jin, who he often tries to beat in sprinting. He is something of a brother figure to Onoda, whom he hangs out with often since they joined the cycling club together. Naruko is known for being "flashy;" he likes to stand out a

name: Sortiliena Serlut
nativeName: ソルティリーナ・セルルト
description: Sortiliena Serlut is the mentor of Kirito during his 1st year in the North Centoria Imperial Sword Mastery Academy, and the 2nd-seat elite swordswoman at the Academy where she is known as the "Walking Tactics Manual." She has very long straight hair and can easily be considered beautiful. As an elite-swordswoman, she customized her uniform to a purple one. (Source: Sword Art Online Wiki)

name: Yunan
description: Yunan is one of the four Magi in the current era. It is revealed that he is the one who raised the first dungeon, Baal, 14 years before the start of the story. His name is based from the King Yunan, a fictional king of one of the ancient Persian cities, in the province of Zuman, now modern Azerbaijan who appears in The "tale of the vizier and the Sage Duban", one of the "One Thousand and One Nights" stories. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Chirico Cuvie
description: As the central character around which Votoms revolves, Chirico Cuvie is haunted by two pasts - one he cannot remember and another he cannot forget. He has no memory of his life prior to his 10th year, in which he lived on the planet Sunsa with adoptive parents who found him in a refugee center and were studying his unusual healing abilities - until they were killed in the first of many enemy invasions. Chirico witnessed their deaths, and survived burns that would have killed an ordinary human ..
mediaTitles: Armored Trooper Votoms: Origin of Ambition
searchTerms: Armored Trooper Votoms: Origin of Ambition

name: Dlanor A. Knox
nativeName: ドラノール・A・ノックス
description: Dlanor is Chief Inquisitor of Eiserne Jungfrau and a first-class archbishop, popularly known as "Dlanor of the Ten Wedges" and "Death Sentence Dlanor". She is named after Ronald Knox, and even upholds Knox's Decalogue during her debates. She has the appearance of a young girl with lavender hair and yellow eyes, and wears a uniform similar to that of a cleric. The ends of her sentences are written in katakana as a form of honorific. She is cold towards witches and takes her duties very seriously.

name: Halkara
description: A young elf woman and Azusa's apprentice. She is an upstanding CEO who runs a company using her knowledge of mushrooms, but in the house in the highlands, she's known for her knack for screwing up.

As Sophie is going to the Royal Castle she is wondering what Howl disguised himself as. Right after, an old dog begins to follow her, and she thinks it is Howl. Heen is on the large side, old, and wheezes a lot, and leaves the c

name: Homura Momiji
description: __Height:__ 145 cm (4'9") Homura acts as the right-hand man of [Hyouga](https://anilist.co/character/145062/Hyouga) in [Tsukasa](https://anilist.co/character/124144/Tsukasa-Shishiou)'s army. She was a competitive gymnast before the petrification.

name: Itori
description: Itori is an old friend of Yomo and Uta. She can be found in Helter Skelter bar, where she makes her share in the information web of the underworld. Itori is over friendly and talkative. She likes having fun and even doing pranks. Her bad point might be her using people like toys to get the information she wants.
